testcase.name: testBiometricsMatchAcrossCustomExamples

failure.message: Photo examples/WhatsApp Image 2026-06-22 at 15.20.20 (1).jpeg should match the registered user (similarity: 0.03730014210577402, threshold: 0.6) ==> expected: <true> but was: <false>

testcase.failure: org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: Photo examples/WhatsApp Image 2026-06-22 at 15.20.20 (1).jpeg should match the registered user (similarity: 0.03730014210577402, threshold: 0.6) ==> expected: <true> but was: <false> at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertionFailureBuilder.build(AssertionFailureBuilder.java:151) at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertionFailureBuilder.buildAndThrow(AssertionFailureBuilder.java:132) at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertTrue.failNotTrue(AssertTrue.java:63) at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertTrue.assertTrue(AssertTrue.java:36) at org.junit.jupiter.api.Assertions.assertTrue(Assertions.java:214) at com.batistell.faceregistry.BiometricsVerificationTest.testBiometricsMatchAcrossCustomExamples(BiometricsVerificationTest.java:91) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:580) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596)

Usando fallback Mock. Motivo: Invalid djl URL: djl://ai.djl.pytorch/retinaface
